news.headline: OWC launches SoftRAID 8.5 for macOS and Windows for enhanced reliability and performance.
news.summary: In Woodstock, Illinois, Other World Computing (OWC) unveiled the launch of OWC SoftRAID 8.5, their updated RAID management software for macOS and Windows. OWC, known for their high-performance storage solutions, memory, connectivity, software, and accessories, caters to creative and business professionals. This new release is jam-packed with numerous improvements, promising enhanced reliability and streamlined workflows. OWC SoftRAID 8.5 brings about significant enhancements, promising better performance for users on both macOS and Windows platforms.

news.headline: Beyond Oil starts India distribution; 6T order, first payment received under new agreement.
news.summary: Beyond Oil has recently started its first order under a new distribution deal targeted at the Indian markets. The company has received complete payment for an upcoming shipment of 6 tons.

news.headline: Omdia predicts Nintendo Switch 2 to sell 14.7 million in 2025, surpassing predecessor by 10%. Strong user base supports this growth.
news.summary: Forecasts from Omdia indicate that the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 is projected to achieve global sales of approximately 15 million units in 2025, after its official launch set for June 5. This would represent a roughly 10% increase compared to the original Switch's sales performance in its debut year. Data from Omdia also references the sale of 13.4 million Nintendo Switch consoles in 2017, despite being released in March. The growth of the Switch 2 is attributed to factors such as a robust user base, estimated at 105 million by Omdia.

news.headline: Options Technology partners with Paget Brown Financial Services for new office in Belfast, Northern Ireland.
news.summary: Options Technology, a top provider of cloud-based managed services for finance, has confirmed ongoing collaboration with Paget Brown Financial Services, a key company management solutions provider for Cayman Islands entities. The partnership extends as Paget Brown inaugurates new offices in Belfast, Northern Ireland. Established in 1981, Paget Brown offers trusted services for various structures.

news.headline: US stocks, including Dow and NASDAQ, rise; private sector job growth beats estimates with 155,000 jobs added in March.
news.summary: During midday trading on Wednesday, U.S. stocks saw an uptick, with the Dow Jones index increasing by approximately 150 points. The Dow climbed 0.36% to reach 42,141.02, while the NASDAQ experienced a 0.90% rise to hit 17,607.06. The S&P 500 also saw growth, with a 0.56% increase to reach 5,664.60. Real estate shares showed a modest rise of 0.1%, while the information technology sector saw a dip of 0.4%. In other news, private businesses in the U.S. added 155,000 jobs in March, surpassing the previous month's gain of 84,000 and beating market expectations of 105,000 jobs. One notable stock, Innovation Beverage Group Limited (NASDAQ:IBG), surged by 207% to $1.52 following an announcement of a distribution deal with a major national alcohol company.

news.headline: Syntec Optics expects double-digit EBITDA in Q1 2025 due to new management and operational improvements.Continuing to invest in new products for various markets.
news.summary: A company based in Rochester, New York, Syntec Optics, released an update today, March 26, 2025, revealing their projected financial performance for the first quarter of the year. They anticipate a resurgence in double-digit EBITDA figures, attributing this optimistic forecast to the diligent work of their fresh management team, which has concentrated on enhancing operational effectiveness and financial stewardship. Moreover, Syntec Optics has persisted in its investments towards developing novel offerings in space optics, defense technology, biomedical optics, and consumer optics, showcasing a commitment to innovation across various sectors.

news.headline: Share repurchase details: March 20-26, 2025.
Dow Jones falls on Trump tariff risk; Nvidia drops as Warren Buffett stock eyes buy point. Retail stocks gain post earnings.
news.summary: The Dow Jones saw an increase today following reports of Trump's restrictions on chip exports in the stock market. Nvidia experienced a decline, whereas retail stocks saw growth post earnings announcements. The live coverage highlighted the Dow Jones falling due to the risk of Trump's tariffs, with Nvidia dropping as Warren Buffett eyes a potential buy opportunity.

news.headline: Wall Street fears recession as indicators suggest downturn. Goldman Sachs ups recession likelihood to 20%. Survey shows 55% fund managers foresee global recession. Consumer confidence in recession at nine-month peak. Economist predicts downturn in next few months.
news.summary: Speculation about a possible recession is growing on Wall Street, as key economic indicators point towards an impending downturn. Goldman Sachs has increased the likelihood of a recession in the next year from 15% to 20%. A Bank of America survey in March revealed that 55% of fund managers believe a global recession sparked by a trade war is the primary risk for the market. The Consumer Confidence Survey by the Conference Board also shows that consumer expectations of a recession within the next year have reached a nine-month high. Economist David Rosenberg anticipates a downturn in the coming months, citing multiple warning signs.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop due to Trump's auto tariffs; S&P 500, Nasdaq sell off; Nvidia, Tesla, Palantir suffer.
news.summary: Before President Trump's 25% tariffs on global auto imports, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq experienced a decline. Companies like Nvidia, Tesla, and Palantir saw significant losses. This news triggered a market sell-off, as indicated in Dow Jones Futures.

news.headline: Chicago hosts 2025 Komen Race for the Cure on May 17 to fund research and support breast cancer patients. Every 12 min, a woman dies from breast cancer.
news.summary: In Chicago, Susan G. Komen® has revealed plans to organize the 2025 Komen Chicago Race for the Cure on Saturday, May 17, 2025. This event aims to bring together breast cancer survivors, their families, and supporters to raise funds for research, offer patient assistance, and bring about substantial improvements for those affected by breast cancer. Shockingly, statistics show that every 12 minutes, a woman succumbs to breast cancer in the U.S. - emphasizing the urgency and importance of events like these in the fight against the disease.

news.headline: Eli Lilly's drug reduces heart disease risk factor by 93.9% in Phase 2 study, with lower doses showing 40.8% and 75.2% reduction in Lp(a) levels.
news.summary: On Sunday, Eli Lilly And Co revealed encouraging Phase 2 outcomes for lepodisiran, a small interfering RNA (siRNA) therapy aimed at decreasing the production of lipoprotein(a) [Lp(a)], a hereditary risk factor for heart disease. In the Phase 2 ALPACA trial, lepodisiran notably lowered Lp(a) levels by an average of 93.9% during the 60 to 180-day span post the highest tested dosage (400 mg), meeting the primary goal. Participants taking 16 mg and 96 mg doses experienced reductions of 40.8% and 75.2% in Lp(a) levels during the same period, respectively. The European Drug Regulator's negative stance on Eli Lilly’s Alzheimer’s Drug was also covered in a detailed story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GOGO Charters to start daily service in Central Florida & Southeast, expanding to 17 cities like Atlanta, Charlotte, Nashville, Orlando in late 2025.
news.summary: The daily operations network of GOGO Charters is set to expand into Central Florida and the Southeast, with 17 cities, such as Atlanta, Charlotte, Nashville, and Orlando, slated to receive daily service starting in late 2025. GOGO Charters is a prominent ground transportation company based in Atlanta, and this move marks a significant step in their growth strategy. The expansion will bring convenient travel options to a wide region, catering to the transportation needs of the area's residents and visitors.

news.headline: Pending home sales rose by 2% in Feb. NAR predicts: mortgage rates at 6.4%, existing-home sales up 6%, new-home sales rising 10%, and national median home price growing by 3% in 2025.
news.summary: According to the National Association of Realtors (NAR), it is projected that mortgage rates will average 6.4% in 2025. Additionally, existing-home sales are expected to see a 6% increase, while new-home sales could improve by 10%. The national median home price is forecasted to rise by 3% during the same year.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls 300 points due to new Trump tariffs. Nvidia stocks decline while Tesla rallies on market.
news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline of 300 points due to the introduction of new tariffs by President Donald Trump. Nvidia's stock witnessed a sell-off, contrasting with Tesla which saw a rally in today's stock market trading session.

news.headline: Ascot Resources Ltd. announces 2024 annual results. Visit www.sedarplus.ca for details on financial statements.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 24, 2025, Ascot Resources Ltd. (TSX: AOT; OTCQX: AOTVF) disclosed its audited consolidated financial outcomes for the year ending December 31, 2024. To access the detailed audited consolidated financial statements, Management's Discussion and Analysis, and Annual Information Form for the same period, refer to the Company's submissions on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca.

news.headline: NILUSDT perpetual swaps with 50x leverage now available on BitMEX, expanding trading opportunities for users.
news.summary: BitMEX has launched NILUSDT perpetual swaps, providing traders with the opportunity to utilize leverage of up to 50x. This addition expands the range of trading choices available on the platform, further empowering users to engage in leveraging strategies for potential gains.

news.headline: Impact of Trump's auto tariffs on top car brands could see prices rise by thousands, leading to potential job losses.
news.summary: An incident involving a factory in Mexico has resulted in 23 employees being injured, with 5 in critical condition. The factory, located in the city of Monterrey, experienced an explosion due to a gas leak, causing damage to the building and surrounding area. Emergency services responded quickly, evacuating nearby residents and providing medical attention to those injured. The cause of the explosion is currently under investigation, and the authorities are working to ensure the safety of the area and prevent any further incidents.

news.headline: New Nintendo Switch 2 unveiling shocks with unexpected price reveal. Source states the price is unknown.
BitMEX switches Mark Method to Fair Price for NILUSDTH25 and REDUSDTZ25 contracts from March 25, 2025, for better accuracy.
news.summary: Starting from March 25, 2025, BitMEX has implemented Fair Price marking method for NILUSDTH25 and REDUSDTZ25. This change aims to improve price accuracy for these trading pairs on the platform.

news.headline: ValOre to acquire South Atlantic Gold to form a 99,924-hectare metals district in Brazil, in a definitive agreement.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on March 26, 2025, ValOre Metals Corp. ("ValOre") (TSX-V: VO, OTCQB: KVLQF, Frankfurt: KEQ0) and South Atlantic Gold Inc. ("South Atlantic") (TSX-V: SAO) have revealed their recent agreement following a joint news release on February 17, 2025. The Agreement outlines ValOre’s acquisition of all outstanding common shares of South Atlantic and its securities, leading to the Proposed Transaction. Under the terms, South Atlantic and 1529317 B.C. Ltd. ("ValOre Subco"), a ValOre subsidiary, will undergo an amalgamation as per the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia). Post the Proposed Transaction's conclusion, the resulting entity ("Amalco") will become ValOre's wholly-owned subsidiary.

news.headline: US stock futures show mixed opening after 3-day rise. New auto tariffs aim to boost US manufacturing & reduce reliance. Fed likely to maintain rates. Notable: 10-year Treasury yield at 4.38% & 2-year at 4.02%. Tech stocks drag Nasdaq down in last session. SPY up 0.10% & QQQ down 0.025%.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures were volatile on Thursday following a three-day winning streak. New auto tariffs were introduced to boost U.S. manufacturing, expected to generate $100 billion annually. The tariffs will go into effect on April 3 and only impact non-U.S. content of auto goods from Canada and Mexico. The Federal Reserve is likely to maintain current interest rates through its May meeting, with a 90.4% probability according to the CME Group's FedWatch tool. The Dow Jones futures were up by 0.17%, S&P 500 by 0.07%, and Nasdaq 100 declined by 0.01%. Major indices like SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were mixed in premarket trading. In the last session, sectors like Consumer Discretionary, Communication Services, and Information Technology saw losses while Utilities and Consumer Staples rose. Notable stocks like Meta Platforms Inc., Amazon.com Inc., and Alphabet Inc. saw declines. U.S. new orders for durable goods rose by 0.9% month over month in February. The Dow Jones index fell by 0.31% while the S&P 500 was down by 1.12% as per Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Record high American wealth driven by stock and home values, but sentiment is low and falling as gains mostly favor the top earners.
news.summary: The rise in wealth in the United States has mainly been fueled by increases in stock and home values. However, this growth is largely benefiting the wealthiest individuals, leaving many others feeling financially strained. The disparity in wealth distribution has led to a sense of discontent among a significant portion of the population, with a large proportion experiencing limited economic progress.

news.headline: Stablecoins gaining popularity, report states.
Buck Teal becomes HONK's new EVP of Sales & Partnerships to drive growth in insurance, fleet, and mobility sectors.
Avner Mendelson named President & CEO of IDB Bank, with over 20 years of experience. Largest Israeli-owned bank in the US.
news.summary: Mendelson has assumed the role of President & CEO at IDB, a renowned New York-based private and commercial bank, which also holds the distinction of being the largest Israeli-owned bank in the United States. His appointment brings with it over 20 years of valuable experience and leadership in the industry. This development was confirmed on April 2, 2025, as per a statement released by PRNewswire.

news.headline: Corgea introduces BLAST, AI-driven code security platform to detect hidden vulnerabilities, protect enterprises.
news.summary: A tech company in San Francisco, Corgea, has introduced a cutting-edge AI-powered tool called BLAST (Business Logic Application Testing) on April 2, 2025. This innovative solution is designed to detect and fix hidden vulnerabilities in code before they can be exploited by cyber threats. By proactively addressing these issues, BLAST aims to enhance the cybersecurity of enterprises. This new offering is expected to provide significant protection for businesses against advanced cyber threats, contributing to a more secure digital environment.

news.headline: DJI showcases latest Osmo and Ronin products at 2025 NAB Show, Las Vegas, leading in creative camera technology.
news.summary: A prominent innovator in creative camera technology unveiled its latest Osmo and Ronin products for creators and professional filmmakers at an event in Las Vegas on April 2, 2025. DJI, known as the global frontrunner in this field, presented its diverse range of cutting-edge products at NAB. The event highlighted DJI's integrated ecosystem focusing on serving the needs of creators and filmmakers, solidifying its position as the leading pioneer in the industry.

news.headline: Inventor from Mass invents FISHING ROD TACKLE HOLDER for freshwater fishing enthusiasts to prevent rods from laying on the ground. (Characters: 131)
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 2, 2025, a creator from Salisbury Beach, Mass., expressed frustration with laying fishing rods on the ground while freshwater fishing. This led to the invention of the FISHING ROD TACKLE HOLDER. The innovative device aims to address this concern and provide a solution for anglers.

news.headline: Clearwater's report for healthcare sector shows 3 out of every 5 assets have critical vulnerabilities.
news.summary: According to recent data, close to 60% of assets have been found to possess a critical vulnerability. Clearwater, a leading provider of cybersecurity and compliance solutions specifically for the healthcare sector, revealed this information on April 2, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee.

news.headline: Details of weekly share buyback program transactions provided, showing significant numbers.
Andes Technology marks 20 years, hosts Andes RISC-V CON on April 29, 2025 in San Jose, CA, gathering industry leaders and developers to explore latest RISC-V tech.
news.summary: San Jose, California - Andes Technology, a prominent provider of high-efficiency, low-power 32/64-bit RISC-V processor cores and a Founding Premier member of RISC-V International, has disclosed that the Silicon Valley 2025 Andes RISC-V CON is set to take place on April 29, 2025. This event will bring together key figures in the industry, innovators, and developers to delve into the newest developments in RISC-V technology and commemorate Andes Technology's twenty years of pioneering innovation.

news.headline: Rensa Filtration's HEPA filters pass UL 900 standards, including SuperFlo V-Bank and Deep Pleat filters.
news.summary: In Aurora, Illinois on April 2, 2025, Rensa Filtration, a top producer and provider of essential air filtration solutions, disclosed that its SuperFlo HEPA V-Bank and HEPA Deep Pleat filters have undergone assessment by UL Solutions to ensure they meet the necessary standards.

news.headline: Amazon joins the bidding fray for TikTok as US sale deadline nears, Bloomberg reports.
Padagis extends Naloxone HCI Nasal Spray shelf-life to 36 months, aiding communities in opioid crisis.
news.summary: Padagis®, a prominent generic manufacturer based in ALLEGAN, Mich., declared on April 2, 2025, that they have extended the shelf life of their over-the-counter (OTC) Naloxone by three years. This development is significant as it enhances access to Naloxone for both communities and first responders who are actively combating the escalating opioid epidemic. The extended shelf life of Naloxone provides a crucial opportunity for stockpiling and ensuring readiness in emergency situations.

news.headline: AB Volvo's AGM held in Gothenburg, Sweden on April 2, 2025. Shareholders could vote in advance.
news.summary: AB Volvo recently conducted its Annual General Meeting on April 2, 2025, in Gothenburg, Sweden. The event took place at Konserthuset, offering shareholders the opportunity to participate and vote in advance through postal voting. The meeting included presentations covering various aspects of the company's performance and future prospects.

news.headline: Marco Pharma International launched a new website and appointed Lisa Conyers as Relationship Manager.
news.summary: The company Marco Pharma International, known for its specialized drainage remedies and practitioner-focused solutions, has unveiled its updated website on April 2, 2025. Alongside this announcement, Lisa Conyers has been appointed as the new Relationship...

news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Musk will depart from DOGE when his work is complete.
US mulls letting ByteDance keep TikTok algorithm control - WAPO.
Scatec ASA reports primary insiders' mandatory trade notifications.
US treating Bitcoin as strategic asset could trigger global policy shift. Grayscale report sees BTC as geopolitical asset. China key to watch.
news.summary: Grayscale's report suggests that considering Bitcoin as a strategically important asset could have significant implications for the United States. The report proposes that if the U.S. demonstrates a strategic interest in Bitcoin and blockchain technology, it could influence other countries to reassess their approach. According to the report, Bitcoin is transitioning from a speculative investment to a geopolitical asset with long-term economic and strategic consequences. China is highlighted as a critical country to monitor, given its current crypto restrictions. Recent discussions by China's Supreme Court and judicial bodies in February 2025 indicate a potential shift in its stance.

news.headline: Ripple's stablecoin RLUSD gaining traction in cross-border payments with select financial partners..qtRipple integrates RLUSD into enterprise platform, being used by clients like BKK Forex and iSend.
news.summary: Ripple has incorporated its stablecoin RLUSD into its enterprise payment platform to solidify its position in global money transfer. Some financial partners are utilizing the stablecoin to improve operations and enhance liquidity management. Companies like BKK Forex and iSend have initiated the use of RLUSD for cross-border payments, highlighting its early adoption in institutional finance. Ripple's XRP has confirmed intentions to expand the stablecoin's reach.

news.headline: Chesapeake Utilities Corp's Ohio subsidiary, Aspire Energy, celebrates 10 years & seeks growth opportunities after merger in 2015.
news.summary: Chesapeake Utilities Corporation (NYSE: CPK) marked a significant milestone by commemorating the 10-year anniversary of its Ohio subsidiary based in Dover, Del. On April 1, 2015, the Company finalized the merger of Gatherco Inc. into Aspire Energy of Ohio LLC. This merger allows the company to provide energy services through natural gas.

news.headline: Vantage Capital Advisors sells 556-unit Midwest multifamily portfolio for $95.5M after strategic success.
news.summary: In Lincoln and Bellevue, Nebraska, on April 2, 2025, Vantage Capital Advisors, a prominent player in multifamily real estate investment, shared that they have sold a dual-property multifamily portfolio encompassing 556 units for a significant $95.5 million. The properties were obtained earlier on in the year.

news.headline: Invesco Fund Manager bets against USD before Trump's tariffs, as reported by Bloomberg.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, marking a significant improvement from the previous month. Additionally, the economy has added over 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, indicating a positive trend towards recovery. The stock market has also witnessed a substantial increase, with the main index rising by 2.5% in the last week. Overall, these numbers reflect a promising outlook for the economy as it continues to bounce back from the challenges posed by the pandemic.

news.headline: Inventor from Jamestown, R.I. creates LIQUID CAPS to preserve leftover paint in paint cans, preventing premature drying.
news.summary: A resident of Jamestown, Rhode Island, recently unveiled a new invention called LIQUID CAPS with the goal of preserving leftover paint in cans. The inventor shared that the innovative design aims to prevent premature drying, aging, and thickening of usable paint. This development was introduced in Pittsburgh on April 2, 2025, with the inventor expressing the desire to address the common issue of maintaining the integrity of leftover paint. This invention could potentially revolutionize the way people store and reuse paint, offering practical solutions for approximately 1000 characters.

news.headline: Industrial robotics market to reach $37.1 billion by 2031, growing at 6.8% CAGR due to automation demand and AI advancements.
news.summary: Rising demand for automation and advancements in AI-powered robotics are fueling market growth in Redding, California. A recent market research report on the Industrial Robotics Market indicates significant traction. The report covers size, share, forecasts, and trends analysis by component, including robots and robot-related technologies. The data, collected up to April 2, 2025, showcases promising growth prospects, driven by a surge in demand for automated solutions. This shift towards robotics is indicative of the industry's growing reliance on AI technologies for operational efficiency and enhanced productivity.

news.headline: YesCare to provide opioid treatment in Louisville Metro Dept of Corrections, first in KY with all FDA-approved medications under one license.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, YesCare has announced plans to establish the state's inaugural jail-based opioid treatment program. This initiative will provide access to all FDA-approved medications for opioid use disorder under a single license.

news.headline: Bitfarms secures $300M loan from Macquarie for Panther Creek project in PA with 500MW capacity; miners focusing on AI/HPC.
news.summary: Bitfarms has secured a $300 million loan from Macquarie Group to support the development of its high-performance computing (HPC) data centers. The loan includes an initial $50 million for the Panther Creek data center project in Pennsylvania, with the remaining $250 million to be released upon achieving development milestones. Panther Creek will have a 500-megawatt capacity and is expected to be sought after by HPC tenants. Despite facing regulatory challenges in expanding its energy capacity, Bitfarms acquired Stronghold Digital Mining for additional capacity. Bitfarms mined 654 Bitcoin in the final quarter of 2024 at an average cost of $60,800 and currently holds 1,152 BTC. Industry pressure has led miners, including Bitfarms, to adopt a long-term Bitcoin "hodl" strategy. Other companies like Hive Digital, Core Scientific, Hut8, and Bit Digital are also pivoting towards AI and HPC, with AI applications showing potential for higher revenue compared to crypto mining. Hive Digital, for example, has repurposed Nvidia GPUs for AI tasks generating $2.00 per hour in revenue. MARA Holdings, on the other hand, holds 46,374 BTC and plans a $2 billion stock offering to acquire more Bitcoin.

news.headline: QualiZeal named Tricentis' AMS Rookie Partner of the Year in Irving, Texas.
news.summary: QualiZeal, a company based in Irving, Texas, was recently named the AMS Rookie Partner of the Year by Tricentis, a notable achievement in the field of AI technology. This recognition demonstrates QualiZeal's impressive performance and dedication in this partnership. The award highlights their outstanding contributions and success in this collaborative endeavor. This acknowledgment solidifies QualiZeal's position as a promising player in the industry.
